zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joanna Bozoun於1356年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其時，她的父親Prior Simon Bozoun57歲，母親Mrs Prior Simon Bozoun37歲。她和Richard Archdeacon至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世在英國英格蘭可瓦爾阮 拉尼恩。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

nameMeanings.name: Joanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form, Io(h)anna, of Greek Iōanna, the feminine equivalent of Iōannēs ( see John ). In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

variants.name: Joannah

In the New Testament, this name is borne by a woman who was one of Jesus's followers (Luke 8:3; 24:10). She was the wife of the steward of the household of King Herod Antipas. The name was regularly used throughout the Middle Ages in most parts of Europe as a feminine equivalent of John , but in England it has only been in common use as a vernacular given name since the 19th century. Celebrated British bearers of the name include the novelist Joanna Trollope ( b. 1943 ), the actress Joanna Lumley ( b. 1946 ), and the concert pianist Joanna McGregor ( b. 1959 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joanna Bozoun was born in 1356, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Prior Simon Bozoun, was 57 and her mother, Mrs Prior Simon Bozoun, was 37. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Richard Archdeacon. She died in Ruan Lanihorne, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Richard Archdeacon. Elle est décédée à Ruan Lanihorne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joanna Bozoun(이)가 1356년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Prior Simon Bozoun(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Prior Simon Bozoun(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 Richard Archdeacon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 루아 랜이호른에서 사망했다.

У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Richard Archdeacon. Она умерла в местности руань ланихаурн, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.
